mapper.select: select id, user_id, referrals_user_id, promo_code_records_id, cashback_amount, status, purchase_amount, cashback_percentage, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from promo_records where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, user_id, referrals_user_id, promo_code_records_id, cashback_amount, status, purchase_amount, cashback_percentage, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from promo_records where order_id = #{orderId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into promo_records(id,user_id, referrals_user_id, promo_code_records_id,order_id, cashback_amount, status, purchase_amount, cashback_percentage, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{referralsUserId}, #{promoCodeRecordsId}, #{orderId},#{cashbackAmount}, #{status}, #{purchaseAmount}, #{cashbackPercentage}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into promo_records(id,user_id, referrals_user_id, promo_code_records_id, cashback_amount, status, purchase_amount, cashback_percentage, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.referralsUserId}, #{entity.promoCodeRecordsId}, #{entity.cashbackAmount}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.purchaseAmount}, #{entity.cashbackPercentage}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into promo_records(id,user_id, referrals_user_id, promo_code_records_id, cashback_amount, status, purchase_amount, cashback_percentage, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.referralsUserId}, #{entity.promoCodeRecordsId}, #{entity.cashbackAmount}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.purchaseAmount}, #{entity.cashbackPercentage}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), referrals_user_id = values(referrals_user_id), promo_code_records_id = values(promo_code_records_id), cashback_amount = values(cashback_amount), status = values(status), purchase_amount = values(purchase_amount), cashback_percentage = values(cashback_percentage), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
